crowd_centric_classifier_cache.boundary: preprocessed clip cache; no online armed/cooldown/rearm state

offline_routed_evaluator.role: locked 526-video routed accuracy and q_video endpoint
offline_routed_evaluator.fallback_semantics: If no tracked T50 stack completes but the gate passes, the evaluator constructs a sequence from the first T50 full-clip snapshots after complete clip processing. That sequence is not guaranteed to equal the causal runtime window at the first route decision.
offline_routed_evaluator.boundary: batched offline clip evaluator with fresh per-video state; not the replay ARMED/COOLDOWN state machine

complete_replay_runtime.role: matched operational call-schedule and execution endpoint
complete_replay_runtime.boundary: per-frame runtime with rolling global history and per-crowd armed/cooldown/rearm state; execution endpoint, not replay event accuracy
